case_title: NEKER ORTIZ VS. JUAN FRANCISCO SOTELO HERNANDEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-20-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-20-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---LENA PRITCHARD. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SIGNED) SERVED SEP-12-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SOTELO HERNANDEZ, JUAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2014 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ORTIZ, NEKER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
